## Verses (6)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | Happy is the worshipper of the Lord, who is walking in his ways. | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | You will have the fruit of the work of your hands: happy will you be, and all will be well for you. | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | Your wife will be like a fertile vine in the inmost parts of your house: your children will be like olive plants round your table. | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | See! this is the blessing of the worshipper of the Lord. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | May the Lord send you blessing out of Zion: may you see the good of Jerusalem all the days of your life. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | May you see your children's children. Peace be on Israel. | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
